rulings.Case Title: SHANE BANNING VS. EVERT GROBBELAAR
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Pltf For A Protective Order, Appointment Of Discovery Referee And Requet For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 20, 2011, line 1, PLAINTIFF SHANE BANNING'S Motion For A Protective Order, Appointment Of Discovery Referee And Request For Monetary Sanctions. MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF DISCOVERY REFEREE IS GRANTED. BOTH PARTIES TO SHARE THE COST OF THE REFEREE. PARTIES SHOULD MEET AND CONFER TO AGREE ON A REFEREE. IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON A REFEREE WITHIN 15 DAYS, EACH SIDE SHOULD SUBMIT A LIST OF THREE NAMES TO THE COURT FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION AND DESIGNATION. =(302/LMG)
